title: Cavendish Loses Control
description: Pages 5–9 focus on cavendish loses control, keeping the Dressrosa conflict and character roles clear for display.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Kyros, Diamante, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5 as cavendish's dangerous alter ego emerges while the fight against the executives grows more unstable.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: A PLATEAL IN THE ROYAL PALACE - FOURTH FLOOR

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Up against "evil" itself! The decisive battle reaches its climax!!

dialogue.speaker: Kyros
dialogue.text: Sun- flower field

dialogue.speaker: Diamante
dialogue.text: Flutter... flutter...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Uhaha haha!!

dialogue.speaker: Diamante
dialogue.text: How do you like that ground? Flittering and fluttering!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It must be pretty hard just standing up, isn't it?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Someone seems

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: One- begged...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: soldier!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Uhaha- haha!! Now I see, every- thing was connected!!

dialogue.speaker: Kyros
dialogue.text: So you were scarlet's husband!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: That day, you were that unsightly, little toy that was crying and sobbing.

dialogue.speaker: Kyros
dialogue.text: and Rebecca's father...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: This is just fantastic....!! you and I...

dialogue.speaker: Diamante
dialogue.text: Our Fates are BOUND!! kyros!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Indeed, that is why I have come here!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: That's quite the impressive movement there for only having one leg!! But watch yourself, my cape is made of iron!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: "Viper Glaive"!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Gasp!

dialogue.speaker: Kyros
dialogue.text: Father!! Let me fight, too!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: pant... pant...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: He keeps targetting me over here...!! At this point, I'm nothing more than a burden!!

dialogue.speaker: Kyros
dialogue.text: That's right, fight!! So I can kill Rebecca proper!!

dialogue.speaker: Diamante
dialogue.text: I want to see what you, kyros, look like...

dialogue.speaker: Baby 5
dialogue.text: After having lost both your wife and dough- ter...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Kyros
dialogue.text: I'm fine, Rebecca... just let me protect you...!!

dialogue.speaker: Kyros
dialogue.text: For scarlets' sake!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Let me atone for what HAP- Pened...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: The fact that I forced you to learn about wars and battles....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: I've never stopped regretting it, even to this day!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: As I continued to live in shame...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Now that I've returned to being human!! I will never again...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Let my daughter wield the likes of a sword!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: Second Floor

dialogue.speaker: Lao G
dialogue.text: LAO G-SAMA has been beaten!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: What incredible destructive power...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: I believe I've heard that name before....!!

dialogue.speaker: Sai
dialogue.text: The flower country's Happo Navy....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: I'd better remember it... who knows when I might run into someone from it again!!

dialogue.speaker: Lao G
dialogue.text: Old man!!! Don't die!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Now we've got two ceremony halls, right dear? (3)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Ceremony Halls?! Dear?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: one for a wedding() and one for a funeral.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: And just who is dead here?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: Third Floor

dialogue.speaker: Gladius
dialogue.text: Shit, it can't be!! Gladius- same?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: The entire surface is inflating and swell- ing up...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: You know what happens next?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: Now that I think about it...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: He had been lurking all about, messing with the ground...

dialogue.speaker: Gladius
dialogue.text: Gladius- Sama!! At this rate, this is gonna kill us too!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: It'll be fine. After all, you guys are elite soldiers, aren't you?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: Ehh!?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: Fucking open it...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: "Punk"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: GyaAAA:!! look out!! Run for it...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: So he was setting all this up!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: Hey, Bario- Lomo, the ground is blowing apart!!

dialogue.speaker: Bartolomeo
dialogue.text: Let me in the barrier!!!

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: No way-bay, if I open it, it'd be dangerous for me and Robin- Senpai.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: Just open the damn thing!! We're on the same Frickin' side, aren't we?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: I remember I could come in too- bay...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: FEST!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #46
dialogue.text: Gyaya Asaka Aah!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #47
dialogue.text: I have a

summary: Cavendish Loses Control advances the Dressrosa story through Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Kyros, Diamante, Unknown person #3, with unclear voices kept readable rather than forced into unsafe speaker assignments.
